title: Raw UGC Mind-Blown Reaction
description: A raw selfie video of a young Lebanese girl having a genuine mind-blown moment while looking at her screen.

prompt.concept: Raw selfie video of a Lebanese girl in her early 20s having a mind-blown moment. She just saw something insane on her phone or laptop and her brain literally cannot process. Hands fly to her head, eyes huge, silent 'whoa'. Pure raw UGC, like she accidentally kept the camera on.

character.hair: long dark brown wavy hair, slightly frizzy, second-day hair feel, one side falling forward
character.skin: warm medium olive skin with realistic texture, real pores, traces of yesterday's mascara, slight oiliness on t-zone, no foundation, just chapstick and old eyeliner remnants
character.eyes: deep dark brown, blowing wide open at the peak, real whites visible above iris
character.expression: genuine mind-blown awe — eyes huge, mouth open in silent 'whoa', hands flying to head

wardrobe.top: warm taupe oversized t-shirt or hoodie, slightly stretched, no logo
wardrobe.nails: plum nail polish, slightly chipped on a couple of fingers

setting.location: her bedroom, sitting on the bed or floor
details: unmade bed, pillows piled, blanket bunched
laptop or phone screen glow visible on her face from below
warm bedside lamp light + slight cool screen glow mix
wall with a print or photo slightly visible behind

camera.shot: selfie medium close-up, slightly wider so hands can enter frame on either side of head
camera.angle: phone held or propped, slight low-angle from below chest level
camera.lens_feel: iPhone front camera, 1x, real selfie distortion
camera.movement: noticeable handheld shake especially when she reacts

lighting.key: warm bedroom lamp + cool screen glow on her face, mixed temperatures
lighting.catchlights: screen glow reflected in wide eyes

image_quality.imperfections: slight motion blur on hand movement

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-0.4s eyes locked on screen below frame, lips just barely parted, you can see her processing

action_timeline.beat: Eyes locked downward at her phone or laptop screen, lips parting slightly, brows beginning to raise. The 'wait what' before the explosion.
Boom: eyes fly fully open with whites visible above iris, mouth opens in a silent 'whoa', both hands snap up from below frame to either side of head, fingers spreading messily — not symmetric
Peak shock-awe: hands hold at head level with fingers spread, head shakes slowly side to side, says quietly 'no way' or 'olamaz' or just a breathy 'whaaat', eyes stay huge
Slow recovery: one hand drops to cheek, the other stays up, mouth half-closes, eyes still wide, looks slightly off-camera processing. 'I genuinely cannot' hold.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Sharp explosion outward, then slow uneven recovery. Hands aren't symmetric.
realism_ticks: asymmetric finger spread between left and right hand
real eye widening with white above iris
messy hair moving from her motion
looking at screen below frame, not at camera

no_text_no_graphics.note: Raw clip only. No text, no overlays, no logos, no UI, no watermarks. No explosion graphics.

negative_prompt: looking directly at camera entire time
